query_name: 検証_営業割合x稼働率_店舗分布
query_string:
with mst_shop as (
  select 
    distinct 
    shop_no
    , shop_name
    , cast(substr(business_start_time, 1, 2) as integer) as business_start_time
    , cast(substr(business_end_time, 1, 2) as integer) as business_end_time
  from sandbox_hiveiq.analytics_20260209
)

, mst_date as (
  select
    case
      when business_dow in ('月', '火', '水', '木', '金') then '01_平日'
      when business_dow in ('土', '日') then '02_土日'
      when business_dow in ('祝') then '03_祝日'
    end as dow_type
    , case
        when business_hour between 9 and 11 then '01_9-11時台'
        when business_hour between 12 and 14 then '02_12-14時台'
        when business_hour between 15 and 17 then '03_15-17時台'
        when business_hour between 18 and 20 then '04_18-20時台'
        when business_hour between 21 and 23 then '05_21-23時台'
      end as business_hour
    , count(distinct business_date) as op_date_count
  from
    sandbox_hiveiq.analytics_20260209
  where
    td_time_parse(business_week, 'jst') > td_time_add(td_date_trunc('week', td_scheduled_time(), 'jst'), '-12w')
    and td_time_parse(business_week, 'jst') < td_date_trunc('week', td_scheduled_time(), 'jst')
    and business_hour between 9 and 23
  group by
    1,2
)

, prep_operatable_agg as (
  select
    shop_no
    , shop_name
    , dow_type
    , business_hour
    , op_date_count
  from
    mst_shop
  cross join
    mst_date
)

, prep_operation_agg as (
  select
    shop_no
    , shop_name
    , case
        when business_dow in ('月', '火', '水', '木', '金') then '01_平日'
        when business_dow in ('土', '日') then '02_土日'
        when business_dow in ('祝') then '03_祝日'
      end as dow_type
    , case
        when business_hour between 9 and 11 then '01_9-11時台'
        when business_hour between 12 and 14 then '02_12-14時台'
        when business_hour between 15 and 17 then '03_15-17時台'
        when business_hour between 18 and 20 then '04_18-20時台'
        when business_hour between 21 and 23 then '05_21-23時台'
      end as business_hour
    , sum(entry_slot) as entry_hour
    , sum(treatment_count) as treatment_hour
    , count(distinct if(entry_slot > 0.0, business_date)) as op_entry_date_count
    , count(distinct therapist_no) as tp_count
  from
    sandbox_hiveiq.analytics_20260209
  where
    td_time_parse(business_week, 'jst') > td_time_add(td_date_trunc('week', td_scheduled_time(), 'jst'), '-12w')
    and td_time_parse(business_week, 'jst') < td_date_trunc('week', td_scheduled_time(), 'jst')
    and business_hour between 9 and 23
  group by
    1,2,3,4
)

, merged as (
  select
    shop_no
    , shop_name
    , dow_type
    , business_hour
    , coalesce(entry_hour, 0) as entry_hour
    , coalesce(treatment_hour, 0) as treatment_hour
    , coalesce(op_entry_date_count, 0) as op_entry_date_count
    , coalesce(tp_count, 0) as tp_count
    , op_date_count
    , coalesce(1.0 * coalesce(treatment_hour, 0) / nullif(entry_hour, 0), 0) as operation_rate
    , coalesce(1.0 * op_entry_date_count / op_date_count, 0) as business_rate
  from
    prep_operatable_agg
  left join
    prep_operation_agg using (shop_no, shop_name, dow_type, business_hour)
)

, rate_range as (
  select
    *
    , case
        when operation_rate < 0.45 then '45%未満'
        when operation_rate >= 0.45 and operation_rate < 0.55 then '45%~55%未満'
        when operation_rate >= 0.55 then '55%以上'
      end as operation_rate_range
    , case
        when business_rate < 0.9 then '90%未満'
        else '90%以上'
      end as business_rate_range
  from
    merged
)

, prep_shop_eval as (
  select
    shop_no
    , shop_name
    , dow_type
    , business_hour
    , operation_rate_range
    , business_rate_range
    , count(*) as rec_cnt
  from
    rate_range
  group by
    1,2,3,4,5,6
)

, shop_eval as (
  select
    *
    , row_number() over (partition by shop_no, dow_type, business_hour order by rec_cnt desc,
        case operation_rate_range
          when '45%未満' then 1
          when '45%~55%未満' then 2
          when '55%以上' then 3
        end asc
      ) as operation_rn
    , row_number() over (partition by shop_no, dow_type, business_hour order by rec_cnt desc,
        case business_rate_range
          when '90%未満' then 1
          when '90%以上' then 2
        end asc
      ) as business_rn
  from
    prep_shop_eval
)

  select
    shop_no as "店舗No"
    , shop_name as "店舗名"
    , dow_type as "営業日種別"
    , business_hour as "営業時間帯"
    , operation_rate_range as "稼働率"
    , business_rate_range as "営業割合"
  from
    shop_eval
  where
    operation_rn = 1
    and business_rn = 1
  order by
    1,2,3,4
